input.question: Build an ETF dashboard with returns, expense ratios, tracking error and benchmark comparison

data.original_question: Build an ETF dashboard with returns, expense ratios, tracking error and benchmark comparison
data.intent: Create a dashboard analyzing an ETF's performance, cost, and tracking accuracy relative to a benchmark.

decomposition.sub_question: How does the ETF's cumulative return compare to the benchmark over time?
decomposition.title: ETF vs Benchmark Returns
decomposition.description: A time-series comparison of cumulative returns between the ETF and its benchmark.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the expense ratio of the ETF?
decomposition.title: Expense Ratio
decomposition.description: The annual expense ratio charged by the ETF.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the tracking error of the ETF relative to the benchmark?
decomposition.title: Tracking Error
decomposition.description: The standard deviation of the difference between the ETF returns and benchmark returns.
